entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop used in the introgression and backcrossing experiments to test selection strategies

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A measured agronomic performance metric used to evaluate the effectiveness of selection before backcross

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A measured agronomic performance metric used to evaluate the effectiveness of selection before backcross

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: A measured trait regarding the time to reach maturity in sorghum families

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall acceptability of the plant's growth and yield characteristics

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The process of introducing genes from exotic germplasm into breeding populations to broaden the genetic base

entities.name: BACKCROSS
entities.description: A breeding method where a hybrid is crossed with one of its parents to recover the recurrent parent genome

entities.name: SELECTION BEFORE BACKCROSS
entities.description: An alternative breeding approach where F2 individuals are selected for agronomic acceptability before further backcrossing

entities.name: DIRECT BACKCROSS
entities.description: The traditional backcrossing process conducted using F1 plants without prior selection of F2 individuals

entities.name: EXOTIC GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material from non-adapted sources used to introduce new genetic variability

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity of alleles and genes available for crop breeding programs

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The total genetic diversity present within a breeding population

entities.name: F1 PLANTS
entities.description: The first filial generation resulting from the cross between exotic and adapted parents

entities.name: F2 INDIVIDUALS
entities.description: The second filial generation from which selection is made in the proposed alternative approach

entities.name: S1 FAMILIES
entities.description: The families resulting from selfing the backcrossed plants, used for final evaluation

entities.name: RECURRENT PARENTS
entities.description: The adapted lines or populations used as the target for backcrossing

entities.name: TEST ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The three different environments where the S1 families were evaluated
